name: HWR_XP_STATEMENT_B
description: This is the table for the experience store statements.

columns.Name: STATEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: UUID
columns.Comments: The universally unique identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: VERB_ID
columns.Comments: The verb identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: ACTOR_ID
columns.Comments: The actor identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: The result identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: The context identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: AUTHORITY_ID
columns.Comments: The authority identifier(actor) for this statement.

columns.Name: TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: The timestamp for this statement.

columns.Name: STORED
columns.Comments: The stored date for this statement.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The object type for this statement.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: The object activity id for this statement.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ACTOR_ID
columns.Comments: The object actor id for this statement.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The object statement id for this statement.

columns.Name: REF_ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: This field is for search optimization and contains the activity value of the referred statement.

columns.Name: REF_ACTOR_ID
columns.Comments: This field is for search optimization and contains the actor value of the referred statement.

columns.Name: REF_VERB_ID
columns.Comments: This field is for search optimization and contains the verb value of the referred statement.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
